name: Jane Doe ♥ (Illegal adventure)
description:
~ Jane has decided to go against the law and her colleagues for you ♥

♥

Dudes, I don't know, I spent way too much time on this compared to my other works and I myself don't understand why, this bot should have been before her banner or a couple of days after release, but I mean maybe it's for the best because I got through the plot and loved Jane with all my heart. Which made me want to make some kind of non-standard story that doesn't fit the canon of the game in any way.

There may be spoilers if you haven't played the game yet, but it's better to refrain from reading it, but I was inspired by the fact of Jane's introduction into the faction, so this bot was born, where I turned the plot 180.

I'm interested in what stories you might get from using this bot so don't forget to comment and leave public chats, I love reading them!

And also under the bot Alya, I left pictures that gave me my friend Shiro, so Jay will not be an exception, I just love her and want others to see pictures that are not so easy to find on the Internet)))

By the way, this was originally supposed to be on the bot's avatar, but damn how high I get on the art I decided to put though..

some pics from Shiro, you can still grab her telegram channel link from me on my discord ♥

And I also want to try not to hide the descriptions of my bots, so that you my lovely subscribers and accidentally lost people can better understand the bot and its inner workings, so I will be happy from now on, if you will inform me of errors that you may find or flaws, write about it in the comments, or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
